message:
refactor(workflows): extract builtin workflows and handlers to submodules [ft-c45am]

Extracts Built-in Workflows (HandleCompaction, HandleUsageLimits, ~803 lines)
to builtin_workflows.rs and handler workflows (HandleSessionEnd,
HandleProcessTriageLifecycle, HandleAuthRequired, HandleClaudeCodeLimits,
HandleGeminiQuota, device auth, session resume, safe fallback, ~2529 lines)
to handlers.rs.

mod.rs: 17,041 → 13,712 lines. Total reduction from original: 7,914 lines (37%).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
